TextENGNew: I'll tell you the conditions for unlocking C6 The Mysterious Deaths of the Furude Couple in the World of the Furude Family.
changeReason: "Mysterious Death" (singular) changed to "Mysterious Deaths" (plural), altering whether one or multiple deaths are implied in the title.

TextENGNew: C5 The Third 'Specimen' in the World of the Furude Family@rD3 The Old Man in the World of the Dam War@r...After viewing the above fragments, this one will become available.
changeReason: "The Old Guy" changed to "The Old Man" (different register/characterization for おやっさん), and "pieces" changed to "fragments" (カケラ is specifically 'fragments' in Higurashi terminology).

TextENGNew: And—@rE3 The Club's Formation in the World of 1982@rM1 The Red Capsule Medicine in the World of Conspiracy@r...These fragments are also connected to its appearance.
changeReason: "A Red Capsule" changed to "The Red Capsule Medicine" — the addition of "Medicine" (薬) specifies the capsule is a drug/medicine, which is meaningful context about the object.
